final:
module pitch_detector (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [9:0] frequency, // Assume frequency is represented in Hz
    output reg in_range
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            in_range <= 0;
        end else begin
            if (frequency >= 440 && frequency <= 450) begin
                in_range <= 1; // In range
            end else begin
                in_range <= 0; // Out of range
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
